cards.front: Closure Property: Regular Languages are closed under union
cards.back: If L1 and L2 are regular languages, then L1 ∪ L2 is also a regular language.

cards.front: Closure Property: Regular Languages are closed under concatenation
cards.back: If L and S are regular languages, then LS is also a regular language.

cards.front: Closure Property: Regular Languages are closed under Kleene Star
cards.back: If L is a regular language, then L* is also a regular language.

cards.front: Minimization of Deterministic Finite Automata (DFA) Equivalence
cards.back: Two DFAs are equivalent if and only if they accept the same language and have the same number of states.

cards.front: Minimization of Deterministic Finite Automata (DFA) Minimization
cards.back: A DFA can be minimized to have the minimum number of states while still accepting the same language.
